chunks.text: Graduate Student Résumé Directory - EECS at Berkeley Graduate Student Résumé Directory This collection of resumes of current graduate students in the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at UC Berkeley is produced annually by the EECS Industrial and Public Relations Office. It is published in the fall semester to coincide with the beginning of the main recruiting season. More than 500 graduate students are currently enrolled in the EECS department and affiliated with research programs. Inclusion in the directory is voluntary, and many PhD candidates who will not be looking for employment until several years hence chose not to be included. The resumes are listed by research areas of specialization; the areas appear alphabetically. Within these areas, resumes are listed alphabetically by student name. We hope this directory will benefit both students and employers by helping to match job opportunities with students’ areas of expertise. Member companies may request copies of the EECS Graduate Student Resume Directory from: External Relations Group UC Berkeley EECS Department 231 Cory Hall #1770 Berkeley, CA 94720-1770 email: public-relations@eecs.berkeley.edu Industry Corporate Access Program Host Your Recruiting Events in EECS EECS Industrial Partners EECS Student Recruitment Fairs Graduate Student Résumé Directory Start-Ups and Entrepreneurial Activity EECS External Advisory Board View Open Faculty Positions
